title: BeamWire — Your World, Delivered as a Beam
excerpt: A perfectly curated daily email and AI podcast — tuned to your topics, in your tone. News, Hollywood, smart home, gardening, gaming and more, delivered before your first coffee.
content_html:
BeamWire
Introducing BeamWire

Every morning, a perfectly curated email and podcast - tuned to your topics, in your tone - lands before you've had your first coffee.

Free to start No ads. Ever. Email + podcast in one Cancel anytime

How it works

Three steps.
One perfect morning.

Step one

Choose your Beams

Pick the topics that matter to you — world news, Hollywood, finance, gardening, gaming and more. Each one is a fully independent Beam, and the ones you choose line up together every morning, ready to play.

Step two

Wake up informed

Every morning your Beams arrive as an email you can skim and a podcast you can play — written in your tone, trimmed of spin, with every story traced back to a named source. Commute, gym, coffee: you are caught up before 9am.

Step three

Catch up anytime

Miss a morning? Every episode and brief is saved to your archive, so you can catch up on the whole week whenever it actually suits you.

Available Beams

Pick what
moves you.

Each Beam is a fully self-contained brief - its own sources, its own angle, its own daily or weekly episode.

News Beams

Fast, opinionated briefings on the stories shaping your world — every morning.

Daily · Free

The Lot Report

Hollywood and the entertainment industry, every morning.

Live now

Daily · Paid

World in Brief

World and US news, distilled to what matters.

Live now

Daily · Free

The Smart Stack

Smart home, IoT, and automation worth your time.

Live now

Daily · Paid

Rate Check

Mortgage rates and the housing market, daily.

Live now

Weekly · Free

Full Beam

Gaming news, releases, and the discourse — weekly.

Live now

Daily · Paid

Grand Rounds

A daily medical briefing for healthcare professionals.

Live now

Weekly · Paid

Meeple Madness

Board game news, reviews, and releases — weekly.

Live now

Daily · Free

The Good Stuff

Good news and delightfully weird stories, daily.

Live now

Feature Beams

Weekly shows and deep dives for the things you love.

Weekly · Paid

Dig This

Home gardening, for people who actually grow things.

Live now

Weekly · Free

Floodlight

Conspiracy theories and misinformation, dragged into the light.

Live now

Daily · Paid

Gridiron Daily

NFL news, results, and the playoff picture — every day.

Live now

Daily · Paid

Full Court

NBA news, results, and the playoff race — every day.

Live now

Weekly · Paid

Extra Innings

The week in MLB — results, races, and roster moves.

Live now

Daily · Free

Stoppage Time

The global game, daily — results, races, and transfers.

Live now

Weekly · Paid

Blue Line

The week in the NHL — results, races, and roster moves.

Live now

Make it yours

Or build a Beam
only you get.

Can't find your exact topic? Create your own. Name the subject, cast your hosts, set the schedule — and we produce a sourced, fact-checked AI podcast made just for you. Included on Basic and Premium.

1

Name your topic

Formula 1, your city's council, a niche corner of biotech — anything with a pulse. Describe it in a sentence and we'll shape the rest, or fill in the details yourself.

2

Cast your hosts

Choose from our AI anchors to present your show. Their chemistry, your subject.

3

Wake up to your show

It arrives daily or weekly — every story traced to a named source, spin removed, just like every other Beam. Or browse the gallery and subscribe to Beams other members have built.

The Voices

Meet your
AI anchors.

Every Beam is hosted by a distinct AI personality - crafted to sound and feel like the real thing.

Zara Collins

Lead Anchor

The Lot Report · World in Brief · The Smart Stack

Warm, authoritative, and genuinely fascinated by the story behind the story. Zara takes the news seriously and delivers it clearly - she just happens to find Dan funny when he earns it.

"The Federal Reserve held rates steady for a third consecutive meeting - and used the word 'patient' four times in the press statement. Which, at this point, may be the policy itself."

Dan Mercer

Analyst

The Lot Report · World in Brief · The Smart Stack

Deadpan, clinical, precisely informed. Dan picks up the exact detail Zara just mentioned and tells you what it actually means. Occasionally devastating.

"The thermostat went offline at two forty-seven in the morning. The app sent a notification. The notification required an update. The update required a restart. The restart required the hub. The hub was offline. So we set the temperature manually. With a finger. On the wall. Yeah, the way they did in 1987."

Charlie Voss

Entertainment Analyst

The Lot Report

Former film financier who spent twelve years putting together production deals. Charlie brings genuine industry enthusiasm — he actually cares about box office dynamics, IP strategy, and who is making smart bets. Strong takes. Stands by them.

"Look — a three hundred million dollar budget on a film that opened to forty-two million says the studios are still learning the same lesson. IP isn't the ticket anymore. The execution is. That one's going to hurt on the balance sheet."

Will Nakamura

Smart Home Host

The Good Stuff · The Smart Stack

Will has automated almost everything in his house — and half of it actually works. His optimism is grounded: he gets excited about things that genuinely help people, and is pleasantly dismissive of things that don't.

"Honestly, the thing I love about this is it actually solves something. Not in a 'we made an app for that' way — in a 'you set it up once and it just works' way. That's rarer than it should be."

Dr. Nadia Osei

Lead Anchor, Grand Rounds

Grand Rounds

Former ER attending who spent twelve years at a Level I trauma center before moving into medical journalism. Warm, sharp, and genuinely excited by medicine — she cuts straight to what matters for the clinician driving to work.

"The trial result here is genuinely significant — a forty-two percent reduction in secondary events at eighteen months is not a number you see often. James, what does that actually look like at the bedside?"

Dr. James Reeve

Health Policy Analyst

Grand Rounds

Practiced internal medicine for a decade before moving into health policy. Opinionated, plainspoken, and always connecting research back to what it means for the clinician seeing patients tomorrow.

"It means the hospitalist writing the discharge order tomorrow has something concrete to work with. Not the p-value — the answer to 'what do I do differently Monday morning?' This one has an answer."

Eliza Marsh

Lead Anchor, Dig This

Dig This

The gardening friend everyone wishes they had — twenty-odd years of growing things, and enough killed plants to know what actually works. Warm, practical, and genuinely excited by the small wins.

"The thing about sowing tomatoes now is that timing really does matter — and it's much simpler than people think. Eight weeks before your last frost. Write that down, work backwards, and you've got your window."

Sol Carter

Co-anchor, Dig This

Dig This

Forty years in the garden and cheerfully willing to tell you about every mistake he's made along the way. His knowledge is deep and practical, but he wears it lightly — and he never makes anyone feel behind.

"I made that exact mistake three years running before I figured it out. Put them in too early, lost them all to a cold snap in April. Now I've got a note on my calendar. It just says — Sol, wait."

Your tone, your rules

Same story.
Four personalities.

Choose how your Beam talks to you. Switch anytime - no commitment to a mood.

Select a tone

Today's Hollywood Brief - Box office, Netflix, and a very expensive sequel

Box office: Mission Impossible 8 opened to $102M domestically, clearing expectations and reminding studios that practical stunts still move tickets. Tom Cruise remains the last movie star the algorithm hasn't eaten.

Netflix: The streamer announced a password-sharing crackdown in three new markets, adding an estimated 4M paid subscribers last quarter. Wall Street loved it. Families sharing accounts did not.

Editorial standards

The story.
Not the spin.

Before any brief reaches you, an editorial AI reviews every line for accuracy, loaded language, and sensationalism - and removes what doesn't belong.

Sensationalism filter

Hyperbolic language, clickbait framing, and panic-inducing headlines are rewritten to reflect the actual facts - not the most alarming possible reading of them.

Bias detection

Loaded words and opinionated framing are identified and replaced with neutral, factual language. The story is reported, not argued.

Fact verification

Claims are cross-referenced against the source material. Assertions that cannot be confirmed are flagged or removed before the brief is written.

Source transparency

Every story traces back to a named publication, wire service, or primary source. You always know where the information came from.

From the wire

SHOCKING: Fed SLAMS brakes on economy as inflation RAGES out of control - experts warn of 'devastating' crash ahead

BeamWire delivers

The Federal Reserve held rates steady for a third consecutive meeting, citing sustained progress on inflation. Consumer prices are up two point seven percent year-over-year, down from a peak of nine point one percent in 2022.

Why BeamWire

Built different.
Priced honestly.

5 min

To be fully caught up, every morning

2-in-1

Email to read + podcast to play

4

Tones to match your mood

Zero

Editorial agenda - facts verified, spin removed, every brief

"

I used to spend 45 minutes every morning trying to catch up on what happened in the industry. Now I play my Hollywood Beam in the car and I'm done by the time I park.

Early tester · Hollywood producer

"

The sarcastic tone is the only honest way to read financial news. I didn't know I needed this until I had it.

Early tester · Finance professional

"

I have Rate Check in my earbuds on the drive to every showing. By the time I walk in the door I already know what the buyer is going to ask about rates.

Early tester · Real estate agent

Pricing

Simple pricing.
Extraordinary value.

One perfectly curated Beam - email and podcast - every single morning. Cancel anytime.

F

Free

$0

forever  

  • Daily email Beam
  • Daily podcast (5 min)
  • Multiple Beams (1 only)
  • 1 custom Beam (shared to the gallery)
  • Full story archive
  • Weekly Sunday digest
  • Tone customization (4 styles)
  • Deep-dive podcast cut
  • Early access to new Beams

Start free

B

Most popular

Basic

$7

per month  

  • Daily email Beam
  • Daily podcast (5 or 10 min cut)
  • Up to 3 Beams
  • 1 custom Beam (your own topics)
  • Full story archive
  • Weekly Sunday digest
  • Tone customization (4 styles)
  • Deep-dive podcast cut
  • Early access to new Beams

P

Premium

$25

per month  

  • Daily email Beam
  • Daily podcast (5 or 10 min cut)
  • All Beams (unlimited)
  • 5 custom Beams (your own topics)
  • Full story archive
  • Weekly Sunday digest
  • Tone customization (4 styles)
  • Deep-dive podcast cut
  • Early access to new Beams

Leading News App

$8.33/mo

Self-serve reading. No audio.

BeamWire Basic

$7/mo

Curated + delivered as podcast.

Popular Music Service

$12.99/mo

Music only. No news or talk.

Get started today

Your first Beam
is free. Forever.

No credit card. No commitment. Just a smarter morning, delivered daily.

sentences.zh: 用一句话描述它，我们将完成其余部分，或者您自己填写详细信息。

blocks.html_en: Choose from our AI anchors to present your show. Their chemistry, your subject.

sentences.en: Choose from our AI anchors to present your show.
sentences.zh: 从我们的人工智能主播中选择来展示您的节目。
他们的化学反应，你的主题。

blocks.html_en: It arrives daily or weekly — every story traced to a named source, spin removed, just like every other Beam. Or browse the gallery and subscribe to Beams other members have built.

sentences.en: It arrives daily or weekly — every story traced to a named source, spin removed, just like every other Beam.
sentences.zh: 它每天或每周都会到达——每个故事都可以追溯到指定的来源，删除旋转，就像其他 Beam 一样。

sentences.en: Or browse the gallery and subscribe to Beams other members have built.
sentences.zh: 或者浏览图库并订阅其他成员构建的 Beams。
认识你的人工智能主播。

blocks.html_en: Every Beam is hosted by a distinct AI personality - crafted to sound and feel like the real thing.

sentences.en: Every Beam is hosted by a distinct AI personality - crafted to sound and feel like the real thing.
sentences.zh: 每个 Beam 均由独特的 AI 个性主持 - 精心打造，听起来和感觉都像真实的东西。

blocks.html_en: The Lot Report · World in Brief · The Smart Stack

sentences.en: The Lot Report · World in Brief · The Smart Stack
sentences.zh: 批次报告·世界概况·智能堆栈

blocks.html_en: Warm, authoritative, and genuinely fascinated by the story behind the story. Zara takes the news seriously and delivers it clearly - she just happens to find Dan funny when he earns it.

sentences.en: Warm, authoritative, and genuinely fascinated by the story behind the story.
sentences.zh: 热情、权威，并且真正着迷于故事背后的故事。

sentences.en: Zara takes the news seriously and delivers it clearly - she just happens to find Dan funny when he earns it.
sentences.zh: 扎拉认真对待这个消息，并清晰地传达了它——她只是碰巧在丹听到这个消息时觉得他很有趣。

blocks.html_en: "The Federal Reserve held rates steady for a third consecutive meeting - and used the word 'patient' four times in the press statement. Which, at this point, may be the policy itself."

sentences.en: "The Federal Reserve held rates steady for a third consecutive meeting - and used the word 'patient' four times in the press statement.
sentences.zh: “美联储连续第三次会议维持利率稳定，并在新闻声明中四次使用‘耐心’一词。

sentences.en: Which, at this point, may be the policy itself."
sentences.zh: 在这一点上，这可能就是政策本身。”

blocks.html_en: The Lot Report · World in Brief · The Smart Stack

sentences.en: The Lot Report · World in Brief · The Smart Stack
sentences.zh: 批次报告·世界概况·智能堆栈

blocks.html_en: Deadpan, clinical, precisely informed. Dan picks up the exact detail Zara just mentioned and tells you what it actually means. Occasionally devastating.

sentences.zh: 面无表情、冷静、信息准确。

sentences.en: Dan picks up the exact detail Zara just mentioned and tells you what it actually means.
sentences.zh: 丹（Dan）准确地了解了扎拉（Zara）刚才提到的细节，并告诉您它的实际含义。

blocks.html_en: "The thermostat went offline at two forty-seven in the morning. The app sent a notification. The notification required an update. The update required a restart. The restart required the hub. The hub was offline. So we set the temperature manually. With a finger. On the wall. Yeah, the way they did in 1987."

sentences.en: "The thermostat went offline at two forty-seven in the morning.
sentences.zh: “凌晨两点四十七分，恒温器关闭了。
该应用程序发送了一条通知。

sentences.en: So we set the temperature manually.
sentences.zh: 所以我们手动设置温度。

sentences.en: Yeah, the way they did in 1987."
sentences.zh: 是的，他们在 1987 年就是这么做的。”

blocks.html_en: Former film financier who spent twelve years putting together production deals. Charlie brings genuine industry enthusiasm — he actually cares about box office dynamics, IP strategy, and who is making smart bets. Strong takes. Stands by them.

sentences.en: Former film financier who spent twelve years putting together production deals.
sentences.zh: 前电影金融家，花了十二年时间整理制作交易。

sentences.en: Charlie brings genuine industry enthusiasm — he actually cares about box office dynamics, IP strategy, and who is making smart bets.
sentences.zh: 查理带来了真正的行业热情——他实际上关心票房动态、知识产权战略以及谁在做出明智的赌注。

blocks.html_en: "Look — a three hundred million dollar budget on a film that opened to forty-two million says the studios are still learning the same lesson. IP isn't the ticket anymore. The execution is. That one's going to hurt on the balance sheet."

sentences.en: "Look — a three hundred million dollar budget on a film that opened to forty-two million says the studios are still learning the same lesson.
sentences.zh: “你看，一部三亿美元预算的电影，开画成本为 4200 万美元，这表明制片厂仍在吸取同样的教训。

sentences.en: That one's going to hurt on the balance sheet."
The Good Stuff · The Smart Stack

blocks.html_en: Will has automated almost everything in his house — and half of it actually works. His optimism is grounded: he gets excited about things that genuinely help people, and is pleasantly dismissive of things that don't.

sentences.en: Will has automated almost everything in his house — and half of it actually works.
sentences.zh: 威尔已经将家里的几乎所有东西都实现了自动化——其中一半实际上是有效的。

sentences.en: His optimism is grounded: he gets excited about things that genuinely help people, and is pleasantly dismissive of things that don't.
sentences.zh: 他的乐观是有根据的：他对真正帮助人们的事情感到兴奋，而对那些没有帮助的事情则愉快地不屑一顾。

blocks.html_en: "Honestly, the thing I love about this is it actually solves something. Not in a 'we made an app for that' way — in a 'you set it up once and it just works' way. That's rarer than it should be."

sentences.en: "Honestly, the thing I love about this is it actually solves something.
sentences.zh: “老实说，我喜欢这个的原因是它确实解决了一些问题。

sentences.en: Not in a 'we made an app for that' way — in a 'you set it up once and it just works' way.
sentences.zh: 不是“我们为此制作了一个应用程序”的方式，而是“您设置一次，它就可以工作”的方式。

sentences.en: That's rarer than it should be."
sentences.zh: 这种情况比应有的情况要少见。”

blocks.html_en: Former ER attending who spent twelve years at a Level I trauma center before moving into medical journalism. Warm, sharp, and genuinely excited by medicine — she cuts straight to what matters for the clinician driving to work.

sentences.en: Former ER attending who spent twelve years at a Level I trauma center before moving into medical journalism.
sentences.zh: 前急诊室主治医师，在从事医学新闻工作之前，在一级创伤中心工作了 12 年。

sentences.en: Warm, sharp, and genuinely excited by medicine — she cuts straight to what matters for the clinician driving to work.
sentences.zh: 热情、敏锐，并对医学感到由衷的兴奋——她直接切入对于开车上班的临床医生来说最重要的事情。

blocks.html_en: "The trial result here is genuinely significant — a forty-two percent reduction in secondary events at eighteen months is not a number you see often. James, what does that actually look like at the bedside?"

sentences.en: "The trial result here is genuinely significant — a forty-two percent reduction in secondary events at eighteen months is not a number you see often.
sentences.zh: “这里的试验结果确实很重要——十八个月时继发事件减少了 42%，这不是一个你经常看到的数字。

sentences.en: James, what does that actually look like at the bedside?"
sentences.zh: 詹姆斯，床边实际上是什么样子？”

blocks.html_en: Practiced internal medicine for a decade before moving into health policy. Opinionated, plainspoken, and always connecting research back to what it means for the clinician seeing patients tomorrow.

sentences.en: Practiced internal medicine for a decade before moving into health policy.
sentences.zh: 在进入卫生政策领域之前，从事内科工作十年。

sentences.en: Opinionated, plainspoken, and always connecting research back to what it means for the clinician seeing patients tomorrow.
sentences.zh: 有主见、直言不讳，并且始终将研究与临床医生明天看病的意义联系起来。

blocks.html_en: "It means the hospitalist writing the discharge order tomorrow has something concrete to work with. Not the p-value — the answer to 'what do I do differently Monday morning?' This one has an answer."

sentences.en: "It means the hospitalist writing the discharge order tomorrow has something concrete to work with.
sentences.zh: “这意味着明天写出院令的住院医师有具体的工作要做。

sentences.en: Not the p-value — the answer to 'what do I do differently Monday morning?'
sentences.zh: 不是 p 值——“周一早上我应该做什么不同的事情？”的答案。

blocks.html_en: The gardening friend everyone wishes they had — twenty-odd years of growing things, and enough killed plants to know what actually works. Warm, practical, and genuinely excited by the small wins.

sentences.en: The gardening friend everyone wishes they had — twenty-odd years of growing things, and enough killed plants to know what actually works.
sentences.zh: 每个人都希望拥有的园艺朋友——二十多年的种植经验，以及足够多的被杀死的植物，知道什么才是真正有效的。

sentences.en: Warm, practical, and genuinely excited by the small wins.
sentences.zh: 热情、务实，并且对小胜利感到由衷的兴奋。

blocks.html_en: "The thing about sowing tomatoes now is that timing really does matter — and it's much simpler than people think. Eight weeks before your last frost. Write that down, work backwards, and you've got your window."

sentences.en: "The thing about sowing tomatoes now is that timing really does matter — and it's much simpler than people think.
sentences.zh: “现在播种西红柿的问题是，时机确实很重要——而且比人们想象的要简单得多。

sentences.en: Eight weeks before your last frost.
sentences.zh: 距离最后一次霜冻还有八周。

sentences.en: Write that down, work backwards, and you've got your window."
sentences.zh: 把它写下来，倒推，你就得到了你的窗口。”

blocks.html_en: Forty years in the garden and cheerfully willing to tell you about every mistake he's made along the way. His knowledge is deep and practical, but he wears it lightly — and he never makes anyone feel behind.

sentences.en: Forty years in the garden and cheerfully willing to tell you about every mistake he's made along the way.
sentences.zh: 在花园里呆了四十年，他很乐意告诉你他一路上犯的每一个错误。

sentences.en: His knowledge is deep and practical, but he wears it lightly — and he never makes anyone feel behind.
sentences.zh: 他的知识渊博而实用，但他却很轻松——而且他从不让任何人感到落后。

blocks.html_en: "I made that exact mistake three years running before I figured it out. Put them in too early, lost them all to a cold snap in April. Now I've got a note on my calendar. It just says — Sol, wait."

sentences.en: "I made that exact mistake three years running before I figured it out.
sentences.zh: “我连续三年都犯了同样的错误，直到我明白了这一点。

sentences.en: Put them in too early, lost them all to a cold snap in April.
sentences.zh: 把它们放得太早了，四月份的寒流把它们全都弄丢了。

sentences.en: Now I've got a note on my calendar.
sentences.zh: 现在我的日历上有一个注释。

blocks.html_en: Choose how your Beam talks to you. Switch anytime - no commitment to a mood.

sentences.en: Choose how your Beam talks to you.
sentences.zh: 选择 Beam 与您交谈的方式。

sentences.en: Switch anytime - no commitment to a mood.
sentences.zh: 随时切换 - 无需拘泥于情绪。

blocks.html_en: Today's Hollywood Brief - Box office, Netflix, and a very expensive sequel

sentences.en: Today's Hollywood Brief - Box office, Netflix, and a very expensive sequel
sentences.zh: 今天的好莱坞简报 - 票房、Netflix 和非常昂贵的续集

blocks.html_en: Box office: Mission Impossible 8 opened to $102M domestically, clearing expectations and reminding studios that practical stunts still move tickets. Tom Cruise remains the last movie star the algorithm hasn't eaten.

sentences.en: Box office: Mission Impossible 8 opened to $102M domestically, clearing expectations and reminding studios that practical stunts still move tickets.
sentences.zh: 《碟中谍8》的国内票房为 1.02 亿美元，超出了预期，并提醒电影公司，实际的特技表演仍然会影响票房。

sentences.en: Tom Cruise remains the last movie star the algorithm hasn't eaten.
sentences.zh: 汤姆·克鲁斯仍然是算法没有吃掉的最后一位电影明星。

blocks.html_en: Netflix: The streamer announced a password-sharing crackdown in three new markets, adding an estimated 4M paid subscribers last quarter. Wall Street loved it. Families sharing accounts did not.

sentences.en: Netflix: The streamer announced a password-sharing crackdown in three new markets, adding an estimated 4M paid subscribers last quarter.
sentences.zh: Netflix：该流媒体公司宣布在三个新市场进行密码共享打击，上季度估计增加了 400 万付费订阅者。
共享帐户的家庭则没有。

blocks.html_en: Before any brief reaches you, an editorial AI reviews every line for accuracy, loaded language, and sensationalism - and removes what doesn't belong.

sentences.en: Before any brief reaches you, an editorial AI reviews every line for accuracy, loaded language, and sensationalism - and removes what doesn't belong.
sentences.zh: 在收到任何简报之前，编辑人工智能会审查每一行的准确性、负载语言和耸人听闻的内容，并删除不属于的内容。

blocks.html_en: Hyperbolic language, clickbait framing, and panic-inducing headlines are rewritten to reflect the actual facts - not the most alarming possible reading of them.

sentences.en: Hyperbolic language, clickbait framing, and panic-inducing headlines are rewritten to reflect the actual facts - not the most alarming possible reading of them.
sentences.zh: 夸张的语言、标题诱饵的框架和引起恐慌的头条新闻都被重写，以反映实际的事实——而不是最令人震惊的阅读方式。

blocks.html_en: Loaded words and opinionated framing are identified and replaced with neutral, factual language. The story is reported, not argued.

sentences.en: Loaded words and opinionated framing are identified and replaced with neutral, factual language.
sentences.zh: 沉重的词语和固执己见的框架被识别出来，并被中性的、事实性的语言所取代。

sentences.en: The story is reported, not argued.
sentences.zh: 这个故事是报道的，而不是争论的。

blocks.html_en: Claims are cross-referenced against the source material. Assertions that cannot be confirmed are flagged or removed before the brief is written.

sentences.en: Claims are cross-referenced against the source material.
sentences.zh: 权利要求与源材料进行交叉引用。

sentences.en: Assertions that cannot be confirmed are flagged or removed before the brief is written.
sentences.zh: 在撰写摘要之前，无法确认的断言会被标记或删除。

blocks.html_en: Every story traces back to a named publication, wire service, or primary source. You always know where the information came from.

sentences.en: Every story traces back to a named publication, wire service, or primary source.
sentences.zh: 每个故事都可以追溯到指定的出版物、通讯社或主要来源。

sentences.en: You always know where the information came from.
sentences.zh: 您始终知道信息来自哪里。

blocks.html_en: SHOCKING: Fed SLAMS brakes on economy as inflation RAGES out of control - experts warn of 'devastating' crash ahead

sentences.en: SHOCKING: Fed SLAMS brakes on economy as inflation RAGES out of control - experts warn of 'devastating' crash ahead
sentences.zh: 令人震惊：随着通胀失控，美联储猛烈刹车——专家警告未来将出现“毁灭性”崩溃

blocks.html_en: The Federal Reserve held rates steady for a third consecutive meeting, citing sustained progress on inflation. Consumer prices are up two point seven percent year-over-year, down from a peak of nine point one percent in 2022.

sentences.en: The Federal Reserve held rates steady for a third consecutive meeting, citing sustained progress on inflation.
sentences.zh: 美联储连续第三次会议维持利率不变，理由是通胀持续取得进展。

sentences.en: Consumer prices are up two point seven percent year-over-year, down from a peak of nine point one percent in 2022.
sentences.zh: 消费者价格同比上涨百分之二点七，低于 2022 年百分之九点一的峰值。

sentences.en: To be fully caught up, every morning
Email to read + podcast to play
sentences.zh: 电子邮件阅读 + 播客播放

blocks.html_en: Editorial agenda - facts verified, spin removed, every brief

sentences.en: Editorial agenda - facts verified, spin removed, every brief
sentences.zh: 编辑议程——核实事实、删除旋转、每一份简报

blocks.html_en: I used to spend 45 minutes every morning trying to catch up on what happened in the industry. Now I play my Hollywood Beam in the car and I'm done by the time I park.

sentences.en: I used to spend 45 minutes every morning trying to catch up on what happened in the industry.
sentences.zh: 我曾经每天早上花 45 分钟试图了解这个行业发生的事情。

sentences.en: Now I play my Hollywood Beam in the car and I'm done by the time I park.
sentences.zh: 现在我在车里播放我的Hollywood Beam，当我停车时我就完成了。
早期测试员·好莱坞制片人

blocks.html_en: The sarcastic tone is the only honest way to read financial news. I didn't know I needed this until I had it.

sentences.en: The sarcastic tone is the only honest way to read financial news.
sentences.zh: 讽刺的语气是阅读财经新闻的唯一诚实的方式。

sentences.en: I didn't know I needed this until I had it.
sentences.zh: 直到我拥有它之前我不知道我需要它。

blocks.html_en: I have Rate Check in my earbuds on the drive to every showing. By the time I walk in the door I already know what the buyer is going to ask about rates.

sentences.en: I have Rate Check in my earbuds on the drive to every showing.
sentences.zh: 每次观看演出时，我都会在耳机中安装费率检查功能。

sentences.en: By the time I walk in the door I already know what the buyer is going to ask about rates.
sentences.zh: 当我走进门时，我已经知道买家会问什么有关价格的问题。
早期测试员·房产经纪人
简单的定价。非凡的价值。

blocks.html_en: One perfectly curated Beam - email and podcast - every single morning. Cancel anytime.

sentences.en: One perfectly curated Beam - email and podcast - every single morning.
sentences.zh: 每天早上都会有一个精心策划的 Beam - 电子邮件和播客。

blocks.html_en: No credit card. No commitment. Just a smarter morning, delivered daily.

sentences.en: Just a smarter morning, delivered daily.
sentences.zh: 只是一个更聪明的早晨，每天交付。

content_html_zh:
BeamWire
Introducing BeamWire

每天早上，在您喝第一杯咖啡之前，都会收到一封精心策划的电子邮件和播客（根据您的主题、以您的语气进行调整）。

免费开始 无广告。 曾经。 电子邮件 + 播客合二为一 随时取消

它是如何运作的

三步，一个完美的早晨。

第一步

选择你的光束

选择对您来说重要的主题——世界新闻、好莱坞、金融、园艺、游戏等等。 每个光束都是完全独立的光束，您选择的光束每天早上都会排在一起，准备玩耍。

第二步

醒来通知

每天早上，你的 Beams 都会以一封你可以浏览的电子邮件和一个你可以播放的播客的形式到达——用你的语气写成，修剪过旋转，每个故事都可以追溯到指定的来源。 通勤、健身、咖啡：早上 9 点之前你就忙不过来了。

第三步

随时赶上

错过一个早晨吗？ 每个剧集和简介都会保存到您的存档中，因此您可以在真正适合您的时候追看整周的内容。

可用光束

选择让你感动的。

每个光束都是一个完全独立的简报——它自己的来源、自己的角度、自己的每日或每周剧集。

找不到您的确切主题？ 创建你自己的。 命名主题、选择主持人、设定时间表——我们会专门为您制作一个经过事实核查的人工智能播客。 包含在基本版和高级版中。

1

命名你的主题

一级方程式赛车、你所在城市的议会、生物技术的一个利基角落——任何有脉搏的东西。 用一句话描述它，我们将完成其余部分，或者您自己填写详细信息。

2

投放您的主机

从我们的人工智能主播中选择来展示您的节目。 他们的化学反应，你的主题。

3

醒来观看你的表演

它每天或每周都会到达——每个故事都可以追溯到指定的来源，删除旋转，就像其他 Beam 一样。 或者浏览图库并订阅其他成员构建的 Beams。

声音

认识你的人工智能主播。

每个 Beam 均由独特的 AI 个性主持 - 精心打造，听起来和感觉都像真实的东西。

扎拉柯林斯

铅锚

批次报告·世界概况·智能堆栈

热情、权威，并且真正着迷于故事背后的故事。 扎拉认真对待这个消息，并清晰地传达了它——她只是碰巧在丹听到这个消息时觉得他很有趣。

“美联储连续第三次会议维持利率稳定，并在新闻声明中四次使用‘耐心’一词。 在这一点上，这可能就是政策本身。”

丹·默瑟

分析师

批次报告·世界概况·智能堆栈

面无表情、冷静、信息准确。 丹（Dan）准确地了解了扎拉（Zara）刚才提到的细节，并告诉您它的实际含义。 有时是毁灭性的。

“凌晨两点四十七分，恒温器关闭了。 该应用程序发送了一条通知。 该通知需要更新。 更新需要重新启动。 重新启动需要集线器。 中心已离线。 所以我们手动设置温度。 用一根手指。 在墙上。 是的，他们在 1987 年就是这么做的。”

查理·沃斯

娱乐分析师

批次报告

前电影金融家，花了十二年时间整理制作交易。 查理带来了真正的行业热情——他实际上关心票房动态、知识产权战略以及谁在做出明智的赌注。 强拿。 站在他们一边。

“你看，一部三亿美元预算的电影，开画成本为 4200 万美元，这表明制片厂仍在吸取同样的教训。 IP不再是门票。 执行是。 这会损害资产负债表。”

威尔·中村

智能家居主机

好东西·智能堆栈

威尔已经将家里的几乎所有东西都实现了自动化——其中一半实际上是有效的。 他的乐观是有根据的：他对真正帮助人们的事情感到兴奋，而对那些没有帮助的事情则愉快地不屑一顾。

“老实说，我喜欢这个的原因是它确实解决了一些问题。 不是“我们为此制作了一个应用程序”的方式，而是“您设置一次，它就可以工作”的方式。 这种情况比应有的情况要少见。”

纳迪亚·奥塞博士

大回合主锚

大回合

前急诊室主治医师，在从事医学新闻工作之前，在一级创伤中心工作了 12 年。 热情、敏锐，并对医学感到由衷的兴奋——她直接切入对于开车上班的临床医生来说最重要的事情。

“这里的试验结果确实很重要——十八个月时继发事件减少了 42%，这不是一个你经常看到的数字。 詹姆斯，床边实际上是什么样子？”

詹姆斯·里夫博士

卫生政策分析师

大回合

在进入卫生政策领域之前，从事内科工作十年。 有主见、直言不讳，并且始终将研究与临床医生明天看病的意义联系起来。

“这意味着明天写出院令的住院医师有具体的工作要做。 不是 p 值——“周一早上我应该做什么不同的事情？”的答案。 这个有一个答案。”

伊丽莎·马什

铅锚，挖这个

挖这个

每个人都希望拥有的园艺朋友——二十多年的种植经验，以及足够多的被杀死的植物，知道什么才是真正有效的。 热情、务实，并且对小胜利感到由衷的兴奋。

“现在播种西红柿的问题是，时机确实很重要——而且比人们想象的要简单得多。 距离最后一次霜冻还有八周。 把它写下来，倒推，你就得到了你的窗口。”

索尔·卡特

联合主播，挖掘这个

挖这个

在花园里呆了四十年，他很乐意告诉你他一路上犯的每一个错误。 他的知识渊博而实用，但他却很轻松——而且他从不让任何人感到落后。

“我连续三年都犯了同样的错误，直到我明白了这一点。 把它们放得太早了，四月份的寒流把它们全都弄丢了。 现在我的日历上有一个注释。 它只是说——索尔，等等。”

今天的好莱坞简报 - 票房、Netflix 和非常昂贵的续集

《碟中谍8》的国内票房为 1.02 亿美元，超出了预期，并提醒电影公司，实际的特技表演仍然会影响票房。 汤姆·克鲁斯仍然是算法没有吃掉的最后一位电影明星。

Netflix：该流媒体公司宣布在三个新市场进行密码共享打击，上季度估计增加了 400 万付费订阅者。 华尔街很喜欢它。 共享帐户的家庭则没有。

编辑标准

是故事，不是故事。

在收到任何简报之前，编辑人工智能会审查每一行的准确性、负载语言和耸人听闻的内容，并删除不属于的内容。

煽情过滤器

夸张的语言、标题诱饵的框架和引起恐慌的头条新闻都被重写，以反映实际的事实——而不是最令人震惊的阅读方式。

偏差检测

沉重的词语和固执己见的框架被识别出来，并被中性的、事实性的语言所取代。 这个故事是报道的，而不是争论的。

事实核查

权利要求与源材料进行交叉引用。 在撰写摘要之前，无法确认的断言会被标记或删除。

来源透明

每个故事都可以追溯到指定的出版物、通讯社或主要来源。 您始终知道信息来自哪里。
